MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DELIA PEREZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Paul D. Singer, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, and opposing party; Delia Perez, Defendant in Pro Per, (415) 724-0892, appearing and moving party (Benicio Penate, translating English into Spanish for Defendant, in Pro Per.
